Founder journey: I have an idea but no product
Simple path: Idea -> customer interviews -> problem ranking -> smoke test -> MVP experiment
Related content/tools: Idea & Validation; MVP templates; Market Research
Notes: Keep this as the first practical journey.

Simple path: Hypothesis -> landing page / Facebook post -> interviews -> preorders / waitlist -> decision
Related content/tools: Customer interview script; Landing page template; Facebook ad test planner

Founder journey: I want to start an online business
Simple path: Business model -> trade license -> e-TIN -> payment setup -> courier setup -> launch checklist
Related content/tools: Trade License; e-TIN; VAT/BIN; Payments; Digital Commerce Policy
Notes: Blend legal and practical commerce steps.

Founder journey: I want to register a private limited company
Simple path: Structure decision -> name clearance -> MoA/AoA -> RJSC registration -> tax/VAT -> bank account -> annual compliance
Related content/tools: RJSC guide; Business bank account; Compliance tracker

Founder journey: I want to launch a SaaS from Bangladesh
Simple path: Market selection -> company setup -> payments/FX -> hosting/tools -> export/SaaS tax questions -> acquisition
Related content/tools: SaaS metrics; Export-oriented SaaS; Bangladesh Bank FX; BASIS
Notes: Important for diaspora and export-oriented founders.

Founder journey: I want to sell to SMEs
Simple path: ICP -> trust-building offer -> sales script -> pilot -> onboarding -> retention dashboard
Notes: Address low digitization and owner-led decisions.

Founder journey: I want to accept digital payments
Simple path: Business model -> bank account -> gateway/wallet selection -> integration -> settlement/reconciliation -> compliance
Related content/tools: Payment gateway basics; bKash/Nagad; Bangladesh Bank rules
Notes: Include mobile wallet behavior and card limits.

Simple path: Product category -> IRC -> customs/trade portal procedure -> supplier payment -> logistics -> VAT/tax
Related content/tools: Import/export basics; Bangladesh Trade Portal; CCIE

Founder journey: I want to hire my first employee
Simple path: Role scorecard -> employee vs intern/freelancer -> contract -> payroll/benefits -> onboarding
Related content/tools: Hiring; Labor law basics; Hiring scorecard
Notes: Include practical salary benchmark research plan.

Founder journey: I want to raise angel/VC funding
Simple path: Metrics -> pitch deck -> investor CRM -> data room -> outreach -> term sheet -> board setup
Related content/tools: Funding; Pitch deck; Investor CRM; Data room
Notes: Include Bangladesh investor scarcity and expectations.

Founder journey: I want to apply to Startup Bangladesh or an accelerator
Simple path: Eligibility -> program research -> application assets -> pitch -> follow-up -> reporting

Founder journey: I am a diaspora founder and want to build in Bangladesh
Simple path: Market thesis -> local operator/cofounder -> company/FDI setup -> banking/FX -> hiring -> trust/distribution
Related content/tools: Diaspora founder guide; FDI; FX; Local market playbooks
Notes: Treat as a dedicated user journey.
